creator: ecronin@tail.eecs.umich.edu
text:
The current version of ethereal is 0.8.15.  The 0.8.14 source has been
removed from all the MASTER_SITES so the existing port will not build.

Bumped the Makefile version and changed distinfo for the new version and
then built and tested.  Due to an error in the Makefile.am man a patch is
required to get man pages to install.  file `files/patch-aa' is new and
takes care of this.  No errors/warnings on the compile and it runs
correctly on my system.  Package was built and installed/deinstalled w/ no
packing errors.

Changed Files:
Makefile
distinfo
pkg-plist

Added Files:
files/patch-aa

How-To-Repeat: 
# cd /usr/ports/net/ethereal
# make
